sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36997" key="e)caule/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξαυλέω</orth>, <sense id="n36997.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pipe away, wear out,</tr_> of the mouthpieces of clarionets, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:67" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.67</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
